ddls:
CREATE TABLE "celebrities" (
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each celebrity */,
  "fullname" TEXT /* Full name of the celebrity */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the celebrity */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the celebrity */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the celebrity */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Primary occupation of the celebrity */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Links to the celebrity's social media profiles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the celebrity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile image of the celebrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("celebrity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "basic_positive" INTEGER /* Number of basic positive sentiments */,
  "basic_neutral" INTEGER /* Number of basic neutral sentiments */,
  "basic_negative" INTEGER /* Number of basic negative sentiments */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "sentiment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment type */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or tags for the sentiment analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "engagement_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics like likes, shares, and comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_celebrity_id FOREIGN KEY ("celebrity_id") REFERENCES celebrities ("celebrity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_sentiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_type_id") REFERENCES sentiment_types ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_types" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment type */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment type (e.g., Basic Positive, Basic Neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the data source was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted access */,
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the access control was granted */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the access control expires */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_celebrity_id FOREIGN KEY ("celebrity_id") REFERENCES celebrities ("celebrity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity the data is about */,
  "sentiment_data" TEXT /* Sentiment data included in the report */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES sentiment_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_celebrity_id FOREIGN KEY ("celebrity_id") REFERENCES celebrities ("celebrity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity being subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_celebrity_id FOREIGN KEY ("celebrity_id") REFERENCES celebrities ("celebrity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
